is a [Group 1](/wiki/Conditions_races "Conditions races") [flat](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") [horse race](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in the [United Arab Emirates](/wiki/United_Arab_Emirates "United Arab Emirates") open to [thoroughbreds](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") which are four-years-old or above. It is run over a distance of 2,400 metres (approximately 1+1⁄2 miles; 2410 metres since 2010) on the turf track at [Meydan Racecourse](/wiki/Meydan_Racecourse "Meydan Racecourse"), [Dubai](/wiki/Dubai "Dubai"), and it takes place annually during the [Dubai World Cup Night](/wiki/Dubai_World_Cup_Night "Dubai World Cup Night") in March.
(at current distance of 2,410 metres and Meydan Racecourse)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Horse race

Dubai Sheema Classic

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| Class | Group 1 |
| Location | [Meydan Racecourse](/wiki/Meydan_Racecourse "Meydan Racecourse") [Dubai](/wiki/Dubai "Dubai") |
| Inaugurated | 1998 |
| Race type | [Thoroughbred](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") – [Flat racing](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") |
| Sponsor | [Longines](/wiki/Longines "Longines") |
| Website | [emiratesracing.com](http://www.emiratesracing.com) |
| Race information | |
| Distance | 2,410 metres (1+1⁄2 miles) *(2,400 metres prior to 2010)* |
| Surface | Turf |
| Track | Left-handed |
| Qualification | For Southern Hemisphere 3 year olds and Northern Hemisphere four year olds |
| Weight | 3YO 54.5kg, NH & SH 4YO+ 57kg |
| Purse | US$6,000,000 |

The **Dubai Sheema Classic** is a [Group 1](/wiki/Conditions_races "Conditions races") [flat](/wiki/Flat_racing "Flat racing") [horse race](/wiki/Horse_racing "Horse racing") in the [United Arab Emirates](/wiki/United_Arab_Emirates "United Arab Emirates") open to [thoroughbreds](/wiki/Thoroughbred "Thoroughbred") which are four-years-old or above. It is run over a distance of 2,400 metres (approximately 1+1⁄2 miles; 2410 metres since 2010) on the turf track at [Meydan Racecourse](/wiki/Meydan_Racecourse "Meydan Racecourse"), [Dubai](/wiki/Dubai "Dubai"), and it takes place annually during the [Dubai World Cup Night](/wiki/Dubai_World_Cup_Night "Dubai World Cup Night") in March.

The race was first run in 1998, and it was initially titled as the **Dubai Turf Classic**. The present name was introduced two years later. The event attained Group 1 status in 2002. Prior to 2010 it was run at [Nad Al Sheba Racecourse](/wiki/Nad_Al_Sheba_Racecourse "Nad Al Sheba Racecourse").

The Dubai Sheema Classic currently offers a [purse](/wiki/Purse_distribution "Purse distribution") of US$6 million making it and the [Dubai Turf](/wiki/Dubai_Turf "Dubai Turf") race two of the most valuable turf races in the world.

## Records

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Dubai_Sheema_Classic&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Records")]

**Speed record:** (at current distance of 2,410 metres and Meydan Racecourse)

* 2:25.65 – [Equinox](/wiki/Equinox_(horse) "Equinox (horse)") (2023)

**Most wins by a [jockey](/wiki/Jockey "Jockey"):**

* 5 – [William Buick](/wiki/William_Buick "William Buick") (2010, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2024)

**Most wins by a [trainer](/wiki/Horse_trainer "Horse trainer"):**

* 3 – [John Gosden](/wiki/John_Gosden "John Gosden") (2010, 2017, 2021)
* 3 – [Charlie Appleby](/wiki/Charlie_Appleby_(racehorse_trainer) "Charlie Appleby (racehorse trainer)") (2018, 2019, 2024)

**Most wins by an owner:**

* 7 – [Godolphin](/wiki/Godolphin_(racing) "Godolphin (racing)") (1998, 2003, 2011, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2024)
